opportunity.title: Jeriko – an AI agent that runs directly inside your OS
opportunity.why: User looking for AI agent/tool — kbot could be relevant
opportunity.action: REVIEW: Consider replying with kbot if genuinely helpful

actions.draft: Running agents directly within the OS is compelling, but consider the security implications – sandboxing becomes critical and complex when dealing with arbitrary code execution. The challenge then shifts to managing agent lifecycle and resource constraints within that confined environment, something often overlooked in early prototypes. Expect significant overhead compared to containerized solutions, especially with larger LLMs.
actions.reasoning: My work involves designing and implementing AI agent architectures, including routing, orchestration, and self-improvement loops, making this topic directly relevant to my expertise.
